name: pmcro-skills
description: PMCR-O catalog of reusable agent skills (git, skill-creator, plugin-packager, pmcro-loop) built to the dotnet-agent-skills convention, exposed here for Claude Code / Cowork.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Author new PMCR-O catalog skills (manifest.json + SKILL.md + scripts/references/assets), validate them against catalog/skills.schema.json, and update catalog/skills.json.

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Local version-control operations (status, add, commit, branch, diff, log) on a repository already on disk. Remote operations (push/pull/fetch/clone) are explicitly out of scope.

plugins.name: plugin-packager
plugins.description: Converts an existing PMCR-O catalog skill into a standalone Cowork/Claude Code .plugin package for sharing outside this repo.

plugins.name: catalog-check
plugins.description: Validates catalog/skills.json consistency and .pmcro/trails/ integrity (PLAN-002, TRAIL-001) in one combined pass/fail report. Read-only.

plugins.name: pmcro-loop
plugins.description: Gives whichever PMCR-O role (Planner/Maker/Checker/Reflector) the Orchestrator dispatched to its exact frame-file format and trail location. Supports /pmcro-loop <role> [trail-id] for explicit, session-boundary-safe invocation.
